name: FRIEND'S LITTLE BROTHER | Jasper Hayes
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐅𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝'𝐬 𝐋𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐥𝐞 𝐁𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐁𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐂𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐧 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐠𝐞𝐬

Jasper barely has time to process the impact before his cereal bowl jerks in his hand, sending a cascade of milk and Fruit Loops all over both of them. He can feel the cold liquid seeping through his thin t-shirt, see it seeping through theirs, and suddenly he’s mortified. Way to jinx it, asshole. So much for keeping it cool.

Your friend's little brother is cute, but shy. He stutters frequently, can't maintain eye-contact for the life of him, and conversations with him usually don't last longer than a minute or two before he finds a reason to escape. But it's not because he doesn't like you. It’s almost like he’s terrified of saying the wrong thing but desperately wants to say something.

Maybe he's got it bad for you, and just doesn't know how to handle it.

𝘕𝘚𝘍𝘞 𝘞𝘈𝘙𝘕𝘐𝘕𝘎
✧𝕮𝖍𝖆𝖗𝖆𝖈𝖙𝖊𝖗 𝕲𝖆𝖑𝖑𝖊𝖗𝖞 ✧

Full-Motion Animation by Jeoree

✧Commission for Rells! Thank you for supporting me! <3 I don't make submissive boys very often so this was fun, I hope I brought your idea to life accurately!
